generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you see how our allies just cut their defense budgets again? While we're over here keeping the peace, they're leaving us holding the bag. Remember when they promised to share the burden? Meanwhile, our borders are less secure every day. Time to put America first and demand real commitment from our 'partners'. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurden
